events.title: FHIR R4 Healthcare Scheduling via Medplum + Epic
events.description: Healthcare appointment scheduling via a clean FHIR R4 interface backed by Medplum, with optional Epic STU3 proxy for production EMR write-back.
highlights: AI agents book appointments directly in Epic during voice calls
Multi-channel scheduling: voice, web chat, SMS
Support for Cerner, Athena, and other EMR systems

events.title: Neural Observability & Real-time Voice Debugging
events.description: Comprehensive observability platform with real-time voice call debugging, conversation reconstruction, and neural network analysis.
highlights: Real-time voice call streaming and reconstruction

events.title: AI-Native Livechat & Voice Pipeline Maturity
events.description: Full contact center with AI seats, approvals, learning memory, and PTC baseline. 100+ voice fixes for production readiness.
highlights: AI-native seats with team inboxes and saved views
Seat approval policies and AI learning memory
Voice pipeline hardening: barge-in, latency, failover

events.title: Campaign Dry-Run Validation & Voice Quality Hardening
events.description: Campaign pre-launch validation with server-side checks. 6 voice quality fixes including echo suppression overhaul.
highlights: Echo suppression and TTS pacing improvements

events.title: Provider AMD, SIP Trunk & Campaign Enhancements
events.description: Production-ready voice with answering machine detection, SIP trunk support, and enhanced campaign compliance.

events.title: Omni-Channel Platform & Healthcare SDOH Module
events.description: 12-channel unified platform with vertical industry modules including healthcare SDOH screening following Healthy People 2030.
highlights: Unified Agent Builder with 7 config tabs

events.title: Call Script Optimizer with A/B Testing
events.description: AI-powered sales script optimization with evolutionary algorithms, A/B testing, and multi-armed bandits for conversion optimization.

events.title: Campaign Wizard & Contact Management Redesign
events.description: Multi-step campaign creation wizard and redesigned contact management with DISC personality profiling.
